measurement_note: Size is P + S, the combined Product and Sales row count. Every product has one full-2019 sales period. The join-and-group query matches each indexed product ID once and processes rows in O(P + S + R) time. A correct slower query runs de-indexed correlated sales scans for every product-year pair, taking O(PS) time; the 32/128/512-row tiers complete normally.
